titleStmt.title: SII 30.127: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 127. (A.R. No. 205 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḻīśvara temple-on the west wall of the same shrine. Pārthivēndravarmaṉ: year 4: 963 A.D.

summary.p: Records the gift of land 1018 3/4 kuḻi for the food offering during the three sandhis and to perform mid-night service and a perpetual lamp to the deity Śri Pōndaip-perumāṉaḍigaḻ at Rājamalla-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tiruvēgambapuram, by Kāṭṭamayyaṉ, son of Chiṉṉamayyaperkaḍai after purchasing it from Tiruvēṅgaḍamādhava-Sarvakrutuyājiyār. The sabhā made that land as tax-free and Nāthagaṇappōsaṉ Ēḻāyiravaṉ figured as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pāṇthyiyaṉai talaikoṇṭa pārtthivedrādipati varmma
ṟku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu tāmar koṭṭattu tiruvekampapuṟattu rājamalla
caturvveti maṅkalattu śrīpontaip perumānaṭikaḷukku
Arddharātra tirityastatiRead- tiricantitiruvamutu nānāḻi yurikkum Oru no
ntāviḷakkukkuc ciṉṉamaiyyap peṟkaṭai makan
kāṭṭamaiyyaṉ vaitta bhūmiyākiṉṟatu paṉai
yuṭai nallū(r)rerikiḻt teviyār tūmpi
ṉ kiḻakku vempaṉ kuḻippāṭakattu pākka
ttu tiruveṅkaṭamādhavasarvva kratuyājiyār pak
kal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya Āyirattorupatteṭ
ṭe mukkāṟ kuḻi nilamuñ candrādityavaṟ sabhaiyār
Ipbhūmikku Iṟaiyiliyākap paṇittamaiyā
l Iṟaiyiliyākkip paṇittu vaittamaiyi
l Iṟaiyiliyāka vaitt(āta)tu Idharmmattukku virota
ñ ceytārai śratdhyāman=tare dharmmāsaṉamuḷḷi
runtu Aṉṟāḷkovukku nicatamirupattaiṅ ka
ḻañcu poṉ taṇṭamiṭap peṟuvatākap paṇitto
m sabhaiyom Idharmmattukku virodhañ ceytā
r kaṅkā kanyān=tam naṭuvupaṭṭār ceytār ceyta
pāpattil paṭuvārākavum 2 Ippaṭi sabhaiy
yuḷḷiruntu
sabhai paṇi
ppa veḻutine
ṉ nātakaṇap
pocaṉ Eḻā
yiravaneṉ
Ivaiyeṉ
ṉeḻuttu
Ivai sāda
diruṇan=ta
Ācāryyaṉ
Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
